inputs.titre: Publication de 'Species Plantarum' par Carl von Linné, établissant les bases de la taxonomie moderne

reason: The image depicts a man resembling Carl von Linné in a study, writing with a quill. He is wearing period-appropriate attire (cravat). The setting includes books, candles, and a writing desk. The architecture appears consistent with the 18th century. There are no overtly modern or fantastical elements. The quill and inkwell appear to be in line with the time period. Overall, the image is well-suited to the prompt.
